title: apium prostratum
intro: Apium prostratum, also known as Pacific or American wild celery, is a perennial plant native to the western coast of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and digestive-aiding effects. The plant's health benefits include relieving menstrual cramps, reducing inflammation, and supporting digestion, making it a popular herb in herbal remedies. Apium prostratum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
